name: Fettucine Alfredo
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the fettuccine noodles in lightly salted, boiling water until tender.
2. Drain the noodles and rinse with cold water.
3. Melt the butter in a sauté pan over medium heat. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Add the cream to the pan and bring to a boil, stirring occasionally.
5. Allow the sauce to thicken for about 10 minutes.
6. Add the cooked fettuccine and grated Parmesan cheese to the sauce.
7. Stir until well combined and serve.
